channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kerala schools face delay in receiving funds for midday meal programme
item.description: Schools across Kerala are experiencing delays in receiving funds for the midday meal scheme, with payments pending since December 2025. Teachers in several schools, including a school in Kasaragod wit...

item.title: Oilers Win 5-3 Over Sharks Despite Draisaitl’s Absence
item.description: The Edmonton Oilers secured a crucial 5-3 victory over the San Jose Sharks on March 17, 2026, despite missing star forward Leon Draisaitl, who is sidelined for the rest of the regular season with a lo...

item.title: Caufield Nets Overtime Goal as Canadiens Defeat Bruins 3-2
item.description: Cole Caufield scored an overtime goal with just 22 seconds remaining, securing a 3-2 victory for the Montreal Canadiens over the Boston Bruins in a closely contested Atlantic Division matchup. Caufiel...

item.title: Kenya Should Regulate Flavoured Nicotine Products to Help Adults Quit Smoking
item.description: In Kenya, there’s an ongoing debate about banning flavours in nicotine products like vapes and pouches. The main concern is youth protection, but adult smokers who rely on flavoured products to quit t...

item.title: Annette Beveridge and the Translation of Gulbadan Begum’s Humayun Nama
item.description: Annette Susannah Beveridge, originally Annette Akroyd, was a determined Victorian scholar who arrived in India in 1872 with a strong focus on educating girls. She collaborated briefly with the reforme...

item.title: Morocco declared AFCON 2025 champions after Senegal forfeits final
item.description: The Confederation of African Football (CAF) don officially crown Morocco as the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) following their Appeal Board decision. Senegal dem lose the final matc...

item.title: Philippine 911 System Upgraded to Detect AI Prank Calls
item.description: The Department of the Interior and Local Government (DILG) announced that the unified 911 emergency system in the Philippines has been upgraded to identify and filter prank calls created by artificial...

item.title: Lagos State to Restart Monthly Environmental Clean-Up from April 25
item.description: The Lagos State Government don yan say dem go resume the monthly environmental sanitation exercise wey dem don pause for almost ten years. From Saturday, 25th April 2026, Lagosians go gather every las...

item.title: Bull sharks display complex social behaviours and preferred companions
item.description: Recent research conducted at the Shark Reef Marine Reserve in Fiji has revealed that bull sharks are far from the solitary predators they have long been thought to be. Over six years, scientists obser...

item.title: Aleema Khan Says She Cannot Meet Imran Khan, Denies Blocking PTI Leaders’ Visits
item.description: Aleema Khan, speaking outside Adiala jail, strongly rejected claims that she is preventing PTI leaders from meeting her brother Imran Khan. She clarified that she herself has been unable to meet him a...

item.title: Jayden Federline Supports Mother Britney Spears After DUI Conviction
item.description: Following Britney Spears’ recent DUI conviction on March 4, 2026, her son Jayden Federline has reportedly taken an active role in supporting her during this challenging period. Sources indicate that J...

item.title: Adelaide Festival Faces Backlash After Disinviting Author Randa Abdel-Fattah
item.description: In March 2026, the Adelaide Writers’ Week event was thrown into chaos after the board decided to disinvite Palestinian-Australian author Randa Abdel-Fattah. Meeting minutes later revealed that the boa...

item.title: Tanzania Works to Align National Agricultural Data with Regional Standards
item.description: Tanzania don make serious step to improve how dem dey manage agricultural data and to work closer with regional partners. From March 11 to 13, Dar es Salaam host national workshop wey bring together g...

item.title: Kyle Sandilands to contest termination of KIIS contract in court
item.description: Kyle Sandilands’ contract with KIIS owner ARN has been terminated, prompting the outspoken radio host to threaten legal action over his reported $100 million deal. Sandilands claims he complied with a...

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Six Actors Who Doubled Famous Stars
item.description: Body doubles play an essential but often unrecognised role in the film and television industry. From Michael B Jordan’s twin in Sinners to Julia Roberts’ body in Pretty Woman, these actors and models ...

item.title: U.S. Military Strikes Iranian Missile Sites Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States announced it conducted airstrikes on Iranian missile sites positioned near the Strait of Hormuz, a vital chokepoint for global oil shipments. President Donald Trump confirmed the ope...

item.title: Woolworths Acquires in2food to Strengthen Supply Chain and Expand Internationally
item.description: Woolworths has officially acquired its long-standing food supplier, in2food, marking a strategic move to enhance both local and international operations. in2food, a privately-owned prepared foods manu...

item.title: Helio Castroneves to Compete for Historic Fifth Indy 500 Victory
item.description: Brazilian racing veteran Helio Castroneves is set to make history by attempting to become the first driver to win the Indianapolis 500 five times. Castroneves, who will turn 51 just two weeks before t...

item.title: Iran Rejects Peace Efforts Following Israel's Targeted Killing of Security Chief
item.description: On March 17, 2026, Israel confirmed the targeted killing of Iran's senior security official, Ali Larijani, along with his son and deputy, marking the highest-profile assassination since the start of t...

item.title: Teaser Released for Denis Villeneuve’s Dune Part Three Featuring Timothée Chalamet
item.description: The teaser for Denis Villeneuve’s much-awaited film 'Dune: Part Three' has been released, generating excitement among fans of the sci-fi saga. The movie, set to release on 18th December, features a st...
